log: === INITIATIVE ===

⚡ Loxodon — Bardic Musician casts Silvery Barbs! Forced reroll: d20:4 total 14 vs AC 12 — still hits.
--- Loxodon — Bardic Musician's turn ---
Loxodon — Bardic Musician casts Greater Invisibility (4th level)
Loxodon — Bardic Musician casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Loxodon — Bardic Musician for 8. HP: 17/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:15+10=25 vs AC 14] HIT! 10 damage. Loxodon — Bardic Musician HP: 7/67
